mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT W.WORD_ID, W.WORD_KO, W.WORD_AR, W.POS, W.DIFFICULTY, W.CATEGORY, W.FREQUENCY, W.IS_PREMIUM, W.IS_ACTIVE, W.CREATED_AT, A.AUDIO_URL AS AUDIO_URL FROM TB_WORD W LEFT JOIN TB_WORD_AUDIO A ON W.WORD_ID = A.WORD_ID AND A.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'ko-KR' AND A.AUDIO_TYPE = 'WORD' AND A.SPEAKING_RATE = 'NORMAL' AND A.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' WHERE W.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{count}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT WORD_ID, WORD_KO, WORD_AR, POS, DIFFICULTY, CATEGORY, FREQUENCY, IS_PREMIUM, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_WORD WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND WORD_ID != #{wordId} ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{count}
SELECT WORD_ID, WORD_KO, WORD_AR, POS, DIFFICULTY, CATEGORY, FREQUENCY, IS_PREMIUM, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_WORD WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY WORD_ID ASC
SELECT WORD_ID, WORD_KO, WORD_AR, POS, DIFFICULTY, CATEGORY, FREQUENCY, IS_PREMIUM, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT FROM TB_WORD WHERE WORD_ID = #{wordId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
